commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6e2e3ad6736953ac7c6a94edd8dd876070b8ac20)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a `/skill` usage/unknown handler, wires it into command handlers, updates command-info tests, and skips full session-store maintenance for command-only session writes.

PR surface: Source +67, Tests +57. Total +124 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the native slash fast path passes `skillCommands: []` into `handleCommands`, and the new handler treats that empty list as enough to reject named `/skill` invocations. I did not run a test because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs a contributor or maintainer update for the native `/skill` regression plus after-fix real behavior proof, which automation cannot supply for the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix(commands): keep slash handling off reply startup
target.body:
## Summary

This extracts the slash-command startup portion of #85941 into a focused PR.

- keep slash-command handler loading out of reply startup work
- tighten command info/session-store behavior around startup-time command metadata
- add focused command-info coverage for the lazy path
- keep the original contributor commit author: Keshav's Bot <keshavbotagent@gmail.com>

Split from #85941 so the command-runtime surface can be reviewed independently. Thanks @keshavbotagent for the original work.

## Verification

- `git diff --check origin/main...origin/codex/split-85941-command-startup`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: reply startup no longer has to eagerly pull slash-command handling work just to expose command metadata.
Real environment tested: local source checkout on fresh `origin/main` split branch.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check origin/main...origin/codex/split-85941-command-startup`.
Evidence after fix: split branch cherry-picked cleanly onto current `origin/main`; whitespace/conflict sanity passed.
Observed result after fix: no diff-check errors; commit author preserved as Keshav's Bot <keshavbotagent@gmail.com>.
What was not tested: focused command Vitest was not rerun after the split; CI should run the normal PR gates.
target.author: steipete
